hypothesis: E-27: DIoU replaces GIoU as the IoU-loss component. DIoU penalizes center-point distance directly in the IoU term, which should complement center=0.2 (MSE on cx,cy). Hypothesis: DIoU + center=0.2 provides consistent center guidance across both loss terms, improving localization precision. 8ep probe vs E-18 (GIoU+center=0.2, mIoU=0.2807). If >0.290, test DIoU+center=0.0 and promote winner to 30ep.
